archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast) for dashboard density
domain: Education, School Wellbeing, and Health SaaS
design_philosophy: Sophisticated, calm, and actionable. Move away from generic flat dashboards to a tactile, deeply trusted interface with precise data presentation. Keep Tier colors conceptually but apply sophisticated shades (Sage for Tier 1, Warm Amber for Tier 2, Rose for Tier 3). Emphasize density, crisp typography, and extremely high contrast for readability.

scale.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-50
scale.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-50
scale.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400

card.classes: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
card.instructions: Do not use heavy drop shadows. Keep cards completely flat with a 1px solid border. Ensure 24px (p-6) padding inside to let content breathe.

button.primary: bg-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-800 text-white dark:bg-stone-100 dark:hover:bg-white dark:text-stone-900 rounded-lg shadow-sm font-medium transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-stone-50 text-stone-700 border border-stone-200 dark:bg-stone-900 dark:hover:bg-stone-800 dark:text-stone-300 dark:border-stone-800 rounded-lg transition-colors
button.instructions: Always include focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-stone-400). Icons inside buttons should be 16px (w-4 h-4).

badge_tier.classes: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border
badge_tier.instructions: Use the tier-specific colors defined in 'colors.mtss_tiers'. Always include a subtle border that matches the tier color family.

table.instructions: Use unbordered tables. Only use border-b on rows (`border-stone-100`). Header row should use label typography (`text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-500 bg-stone-50/50`). Align numeric columns to the right.

charts.instructions: Use Recharts. Ensure tooltips have a clean, white background with a subtle border and shadow. Use the exact chart_fill hex colors for Tier distributions.

sidebar.instructions: Use a light, transparent background (`bg-stone-50/50`). Active links should have a `bg-white shadow-sm border border-stone-200` to stand out physically from the sidebar canvas. Inactive links should be `text-stone-500 hover:bg-stone-100`.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements should have a subtle transform (`hover:-translate-y-[1px]`) and transition properties (`transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out`).
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion to stagger dashboard widgets on load. `<motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, staggerChildren: 0.1 }}>`.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over Tier badges maintains a minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use dark text (e.g., emerald-800) over light backgrounds (e.g., emerald-50).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and key metric cards MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="tier-1-student-count"`).
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All focusable elements must have explicit `focus-visible:ring-2` to aid keyboard navigation.

backgrounds.description: Modern building interior with glass and concrete structures. Use as split-screen background for the login/auth page with a subtle white/black overlay (bg-black/20).

avatars.description: Student portrait. Use in student lists and profiles.
Student portrait. Use in student lists and profiles.
Student portrait. Use in student lists and profiles.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React consistently for sidebar nav, action buttons, and empty states. Size: w-4 h-4 for buttons, w-5 h-5 for sidebar, w-12 h-12 with low opacity for empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON fully before modifying the codebase.
The application is using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI. Keep all components responsive and mobile-first.
Do NOT use the generic default Tailwind green/yellow/red. You MUST use the exact sophisticated MTSS Tier colors defined under `colors.mtss_tiers`.
Update the dashboard charts to use Recharts, matching the Tier colors in the tooltips and segments.
Use Manrope for all text. For headings, use `tracking-tight` to make them feel highly professional.
Avoid thick shadows on cards. Use `border-stone-200` with `shadow-sm` and pure `bg-white`.
When modifying the Student Profile, focus heavily on the data layout. Use a structured Bento grid rather than scattered cards.
Never leave empty `src` for images. Always use the provided media URLs for avatars and login backgrounds.
Ensure the sidebar navigation is clean, utilizing the new color patterns (stone-50 background, white active items).
Add `data-testid` to all interactive components for the test suite.
